title: Looking for Category Manager at Lenskart

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Lenskart
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lenskart. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Lenskart:
Lenskart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenskart!
